name: openspec-generator
description: AI-friendly Markdown DSL → OpenAPI 3.1 + readable docs + HTML dashboard + Try It + mock server + SDK + export + diff + lint + coverage.

scripts.sample: npm run build && node dist/cli.js scan examples --out output
scripts.publish:check: npm run build && npm test && npm run lint && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.test:all: npm run build && node dist/cli.js lint examples/simple-api.md && node dist/cli.js validate examples/simple-api.md && npm test
